Document:
# Brigmedic
- 1.
 Standard [color=#00a933]Code Green[/color] equipment is:
in
- 2.
 The Brigmedic is not to perform the duties of the Security Officer, but may engage if transgressions occur in their immediate vicinity.
- 3.
 The Brigmedic is obligated to lend medical assistance to the following Crew Assets, in order of importance:

 3.1 Members of Command
 3.2 Members of Security
 3.3 Prisoners and detainees
- 4.
 The Brigmedic is not obligated to lend aid to regular crew, but may do so if they have the time and resources.
- 5.
 The Brigmedic is not to put themselves in harm's way unless there is no other choice.
